scope.rationale: DiffusionDet nn.Module 재구현 (detectron2 없이). ResNet50+FPN (torchvision) + 6 DetectionHead + DDIM sampler + box/cls heads. models/README.md 에 mermaid 구조도 + shape 표.

steps.name: backbone-resnet50-fpn
steps.success_metric: python3 -c 'from models.backbone import build_backbone; import torch; m=build_backbone(); x=torch.randn(2,3,800,800); out=m(x); assert len(out)==4 and out[0].shape[1]==256'
steps.summary: models/backbone.py — ResNet50+FPN (torchvision resnet_fpn_backbone, freeze_at=2). build_backbone(pretrained=True) → 4 FPN levels, channel 256. forward shape PASS [B,256,200,200] @ 800x800 input. detectron2 의존성 0. (사전학습 캐시 = TORCH_HOME=/workspace/fm-det/.cache/torch 우회 사용 — I-07.)

steps.name: sampler-ddim
steps.success_metric: python3 -c 'from models.sampler import DiffusionDetSampler; import torch; s=DiffusionDetSampler(1000); xt = s.q_sample(torch.randn(4,500,4), torch.tensor([500]*4), torch.randn(4,500,4)); assert xt.shape == (4,500,4)'
steps.summary: models/sampler.py — DiffusionDetSampler (T=1000, cosine schedule). q_sample / p_sample / box scale 2.0 동치. shape PASS [B,N,4].

steps.name: decoder-6heads
steps.success_metric: test -f models/decoder.py && python3 -c 'from models.decoder import Decoder; print(Decoder.__name__)'
steps.summary: models/decoder.py — Decoder (6 DetectionHead 계층, deep supervision). models/diffusiondet.py 가 backbone+sampler+decoder 통합. eval shape [B,N,C/4], train shape [B,K=6,N,C/4].

steps.name: model-sanity-overfit
steps.success_metric: jq -e '.forward_shape_ok == true and .all_params_have_grad == true and .param_count_m < 150 and .overfit_one_batch_loss < 1.0' runs/{run_dir}/sanity.json

steps.name: readme-mermaid
steps.success_metric: test -f models/README.md && grep -q '```mermaid' models/README.md && grep -q 'flowchart' models/README.md
steps.summary: models/README.md — mermaid 2개 (전체 구조 flowchart + DetectionHead 내부) + 사전학습 가중치 위치 안내. param count 110.7M.
